sections.paragraph:
ἡμερόω (s. prec. entry; Aeschyl., Hdt. et al.; PPrinc 119, 12 [IV a.d.] of land cleared for crops; Wsd 16:18; TestJud 2:3; Philo) to tame fig. of wicked desires Hm 12, 1, 2.—DELG s.v. ἥμερος.

prec. prec. = preceding

Aeschyl Aeschyl , V b.c.—List 5

Hdt. Hdt. = Herodotus, V b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

PPrinc PPrinc = Papyri in the Princeton University Collections—List 4

TestJud TestJud = Testament of Judah, s. Test12Patr—List 2

Philo Philo = P. of Alexandria, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

Hm Hm = Mandates

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 438
